description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two test jobs using the flycheck/emacs-cask Docker images. In the testing-26.1 job (stage test) run emacs --version, cask version, cask install --dev, cask update, ./orgversion.sh, cask build, cask clean-elc, and cask exec ert-runner --debug. In the testing-26.1-rc1 job (stage test) set variable UNDERCOVER_FORCE='true', run after_script apt-get update && apt-get -y install curl and ./coverage.sh, then execute the same script steps as the first job using the flycheck/emacs-cask:26.1-rc1 image, with no caches, artifacts, or rules defined.
